Dedicated Solutions for Any Scale

MSME Operations

Direct customer relationship management. Our M-Pesa integration logs sales automatically while you focus on providing excellence.

  • ● Auto M-Pesa CRM Hooks
  • ● Smart SMS Promotions
  • ● High-Velocity Selling

Program Impact & M&E

Data-driven donor compliance. Ditch spreadsheets and log field interventions securely with isolated architecture.

  • ● 1-Click Donor CSV Audits
  • ● PII-Stripped Security IDs
  • ● Impact Analytics Suite

Hospitality Management

A beautiful PMS that finally maps correctly. Direct folio management for bars, restaurants, and resort activities.

  • ● Automated Activity Alerts
  • ● Master Folio Auditing
  • ● Real-time Yield Trends
